## PR 6: Supporting Signal Artifact Generation

### Scope

Adds writer substrate for non-governing support artifacts:

- `story_shape_signal_map_v1`
- `manuscript_signal_appendix_v1`

This PR is intentionally stacked on PR #633. It should be retargeted after upstream PRs merge.

### Why

The accepted Story Ledger is the only story-understanding authority for Phase 2. These support artifacts enrich Phase 2 with structural/surface signals while remaining separate from the ledger and never becoming Layer 9.

### In scope

- Build `story_shape_signal_map_v1` coupled to `accepted_story_ledger_v1`.
- Build `manuscript_signal_appendix_v1` coupled to `accepted_story_ledger_v1`.
- Store `accepted_story_ledger_artifact_id` and `accepted_story_ledger_source_hash` on both support artifacts.
- Preserve `active`, `stale`, and `degraded` status semantics.
- Add freshness logic that marks support artifacts stale when the accepted ledger hash changes.

### Out of scope

- Mutating `accepted_story_ledger_v1`.
- Re-running Phase 1A extraction or character sweeps.
- Phase 2 scoring or diagnostics.
- UI shell.
- Routes, workers, cron, SQL, prompts, queue wiring, or processor mutation.
- Any Layer 9 behavior.

### Files added

- `lib/evaluation/support-artifacts/supportingSignalWriters.ts`
- `__tests__/evaluation/supportingSignalWriters.test.ts`

### Tests added

- Builds `story_shape_signal_map_v1` coupled to accepted ledger artifact id/hash.
- Builds `manuscript_signal_appendix_v1` coupled to accepted ledger artifact id/hash.
- Writes only the two support artifacts and never mutates accepted ledger authority.
- Marks support artifact stale when accepted ledger source hash changes.
- Preserves degraded support artifact state without promoting it to active.

### Reviewer note

This PR must remain support-artifact substrate only. Reject any commit that mutates accepted ledgers, introduces Phase 2 scoring, creates Layer 9 behavior, adds UI, or wires routes/workers/cron/SQL/prompts.
